contradictions.claim_text: The product's CEFR certification is sufficient for official needs.
contradictions.resolution: Separate official certification routes from ordinary course completion. Do not market a provider-issued CEFR-style certificate as automatically sufficient for nationality or other official needs.
contradictions.why_it_matters: This is the main truth-layer risk in the card: blending learning progress with official recognition.

open_issues.claim_text: INLL courses do not give a certificate valid for a nationality application.
open_issues.resolution: Use the narrower FAQ wording about article-28 nationality courses instead.
open_issues.notes: The official distinction is real, but the exact legacy sentence is broader than the safest evidence.

open_issues.claim_text: INLL is free, overcrowded and generic.
open_issues.notes: Only a free public self-learning route is evidenced.

open_issues.claim_text: Luxembourgish demand is rising because of integration requirements.
open_issues.notes: No primary demand-growth metric was found in the rerun.
